lines.speaker: Nurse Boubou
lines.text: Patients, patients everywhere! We need to get these soldiers up and fighting again!

lines.speaker: Nurse Boubou
lines.text: I don't have time to chat, I have patients to attend to.

lines.speaker: Nurse Boubou
lines.text: I can't take much more of this. As soon as we help one patient, another comes in!

lines.speaker: Nurse Boubou
lines.text: Patients, patients everywhere! We need all the help we can get to get these soldiers up and fighting again. Can you help us?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, what do you need me to do?

lines.speaker: Nurse Boubou
lines.text: Firstly, you're going to need to gather some medpacks. There should be plenty of boxes around here with some in.

lines.speaker: Nurse Boubou
lines.text: After you've got some, we have several tents full of soldiers who've been hurt in the battle against the lizardmen.

lines.speaker: Nurse Boubou
lines.text: Good, you have already found some medpacks. Now, we have several tents full of soldiers who've been hurt in the battle against the lizardmen.

lines.speaker: Nurse Boubou
lines.text: If you could help them out with those medpacks, that would be a massive help.

lines.speaker: Nurse Boubou
lines.text: The people of Shayzien will thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you, I will get right to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm sorry but I've got better things to be doing.
